name: CONTRACT-BUG-4
title: feature.json.schema.json requires bugs_root but contract/feature.json lacks it; additionalProperties:false rejects 'updated' field
description: schemas/feature.json.schema.json declares 'bugs_root' as a required field with additionalProperties:false. However, the contract feature's own feature.json (and others) DO NOT include bugs_root, and DO include an 'updated' field. The schema would reject every existing feature.json. validate-feature.py does not enforce bugs_root and test-validate-no-bugs-root.py explicitly tests that feature.json WITHOUT bugs_root is valid. Fix: drop 'bugs_root' from required and add 'updated' to allowed properties.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
